FileSubject.description: Subject schema for the Data dimension — a file on disk.
FileSubject.title: FileSubject

Provenance.description:
Origin marker for an envelope.

Optional on every envelope — live captures leave it unset. Replay
runs (``dimensions <dim> scenarios run``) stamp it with the
scenario that produced the envelope so renderers can surface
``This came from scenario X`` without having to match URLs after
the fact.

kind.description: What produced this envelope. Today only `scenario`; more kinds (replay-of-replay, llm-discovery, …) later.
kind.title: Kind

path.description: Source file the scenario was loaded from (relative).
path.title: Path

Provenance.title: Provenance

description: Envelope contract for the `data` dimension: structural observations of a JSON file (size, depth, key frequency, value-type distribution). Subject is a FileSubject. Observation kinds are $ref'd from observation.schema.json.

envelope_name.description: Stable key for this envelope within its (dimension, label). Plugins emit multiple envelopes per `collect()` call (e.g., one per source file or per URL × artifact-type); the name keeps them addressable. Default `main` for single-envelope plugins.
envelope_name.title: Envelope Name

envelope_version.description: Envelope shape version. Bumps when shared top-level fields change. v2 added `envelope_name` for multi-envelope captures.
envelope_version.title: Envelope Version

observation_schema_version.description: Observation kind catalog version. Bumps when an observation kind is added, removed, or its shape changes. v2 added the `payload` kind for arbitrary structured data.
observation_schema_version.title: Observation Schema Version

provenance.description: Origin marker (scenario replay, …). Unset on live captures.

title: DataEnvelope
